config.script:
"""
		Written By: Amitkumar Ravat
		Written Date: 12/03/2024
		Purpose:			 
				check whether user is authenticated if not return to login poge
	"""	
	try:
	#start of try block
		previousPage = self.session.custom.IsShiftConfigurationAuthenticated
		if not previousPage:
			system.perspective.navigate('/')
		else:
			self.session.custom.TopViewHeader = "Shift Configuration"
			system.perspective.closeDock('rightp')
			system.perspective.openDock("rightView")
			messageType = 'tableRefresh'    	 			
			system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType,scope = 'page' )
	#End of try block		
	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='Shift'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Admin/Shift')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onStartup  -> Shift')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

"""
		Written By: Amitkumar Ravat
		Written Date: 27/03/2024
		Purpose:			 
				Parsing data to add/edit panel on table row selection
	"""	
	try:
		messageType = 'shiftPanel'   
		headerLabel = "Edit"
		Action = 'Update'
		
		selectedRow = self.props.selection.data
		system.perspective.print(selectedRow)
		for data in	selectedRow:
			ShiftNumber = data['ShiftNumber']
			Description = data['Description']
			StartTime = data['ShiftStart']
			EndTime = data['ShiftEnd']
			IsActive = data['IsActive']
			if IsActive:
				IsActive = 1
			else:
				IsActive = 0
			ShiftName = data['MST_Shift_Id']
			AreaName = data['MST_Area_Id']
			LineName = data['MST_Line_Id']
			TRNShiftID = data['TRN_Shift_Id']
				
			payload = {'headerLabel':headerLabel,
			'AreaName':AreaName,
			'ShiftNumber':ShiftNumber,
			'Description':Description,
			'StartTime':StartTime,
			'EndTime':EndTime,
			'IsActive':IsActive,
			'ShiftName':ShiftName,
			'LineName':LineName,
			'Action':Action}
	
		folderName = 'Project_VECV/Shift'
		colName = 'Id'
		self.session.custom.selectedTRNShiftID = TRNShiftID
		system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType, payload, scope = 'page' )	
		#show edit/delete button
		system.perspective.sendMessage("deleteIsVisible",payload = {"IsVisible":1,"id":int(TRNShiftID),"folder":str(folderName),"colName":str(colName)}, scope = "page")
		system.perspective.sendMessage("isEditDisplay",payload = {"IsVisible":1}, scope = "page")
		system.perspective.closeDock('rightp')
		system.perspective.openDock('rightView')
	except:
		screenName ='Shift'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Admin/Shift')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onRowClick -> cntBody/cntBody/tblShift')   
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

messageHandlers.script:
"""
		Written By: Amitkumar Ravat
		Written Date: 27/03/2024
		Purpose: For Table Refresh and Row deselection.
	"""	
	try:
		# implement your handler here
		self.refreshBinding("props.data")
		self.session.custom.type='Add'
		headerLabel = "Add"
		messageType = 'shiftPanel'  
		Action = "Save"
		dt = '2024-1-1 07:00:00'
		year = int(dt.split(" ")[0].split("-")[0])
		month = int(dt.split(" ")[0].split("-")[1])
		date = int(dt.split(" ")[0].split("-")[2])
		
		newDate = system.date.getDate(year, month, date)
		
		hours = int(dt.split(" ")[1].split(":")[0])
		mins = int(dt.split(" ")[1].split(":")[1])
		
		StartTime = system.date.setTime(newDate, hours, mins, 0)
		
		payload = {'headerLabel':headerLabel,
					'AreaName':-1,
					'ShiftNumber':'',
					'Description':'',
					'StartTime':StartTime,
					'IsActive':1,
					'ShiftName':-1,
					'LineName':-1,
					'Action':Action}
		system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType, payload, scope = 'page' )
	
		system.perspective.sendMessage("tableRow",payload = {"Index":-1}, scope = "page")	
		system.perspective.sendMessage("deleteIsVisible",payload = {"IsVisible":0}, scope = "page")	
		system.perspective.sendMessage("isEditDisplay",payload = {"IsVisible":0}, scope = "page")
	except:
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='Shift'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Admin/Shift')  
		errorFunction = str('Message Handler:tableRefresh -> cntBody/tblShift')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber) 
	#End of except block

# implement your handler here
	"""
		Written By: AmitKumar Ravat
		Written Date: 27/03/2024
		Purpose: Row deselection based on Payload Received.
	"""
	try:
		self.props.selection.selectedRow = payload['Index']
	except:
		screenName ='Shift'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Admin/Shift')  
		errorFunction = str('Message Handler:tableRow -> cntBody/tblShift')  
		errorType=str('Application')
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

config.script:
"""
		Written By: Amitkumar Ravat
		Written Date: 27/03/2024
		Purpose: For row Deselection.
	"""	
	self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntBody").getChild("tblShift").props.selection.selectedRow=-1
	self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntBody").getChild("tblShift").props.selection.selectedColumn=''
